description: Any PR that changes files under src/ must update CHANGELOG.md. Any PR that adds or removes a module under src/services/, src/ui/components/, or src/ui/pages/ must add a Build Log entry to docs/architecture.md.
rationale: Keeps the living architecture doc and release notes in sync automatically — issue #43

details.changelog: Add an entry under ## [Unreleased] in CHANGELOG.md whenever any src/ file changes.
details.architecture_build_log: Append a dated entry to the '## Build Log' section of docs/architecture.md whenever a module is added, removed, or significantly restructured. Format: '### YYYY-MM-DD — PR #N — <short title>' followed by what changed and why.
details.claude_md_sync: Whenever CLAUDE.md is updated, apply the same changes to AGENTS.md. They must never diverge.
